popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Catharina Stuart was born in May 1491 in Edinburgh, Midlothian, Scotland. She had two sons and four daughters with David Lord Douglas van Pittendreich between 1482 and 1522. She died on July 5, 1554, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Stewart於1489年7月17日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，她的父親James IV Stewart King of Scotland16歲，母親Marion Margaret Boyd12歲。她於1507年12月10日與Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1554年7月5日在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Stewart于1489年7月17日出生在英国苏格兰艾丁波时，她的父亲James IV Stewart King of Scotland16岁，母亲Marion Margaret Boyd12岁。她于1507年12月10日与Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton在英国苏格兰度福利爾莫頓结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1554年7月5日在英国苏格兰艾丁波享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: ‘tendril’ or ‘creeper’, often used in metaphors describing the slender curvature of eyebrows, arms, hair, swords, lightning, and women's bodies.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Stewart was born on 17 July 1489, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, James IV Stewart King of Scotland, was 16 and her mother, Marion Margaret Boyd, was 12. She married Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton on 10 December 1507, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died on 5 July 1554, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Stewart est née le 17 juillet 1489, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, James IV Stewart King of Scotland, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Marion Margaret Boyd, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton le 10 décembre 1507, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 juillet 1554, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Stewart am 17. Juli 1489 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James IV Stewart King of Scotland 16 und ihre Mutter Marion Margaret Boyd 12. Sie hat am 10. Dezember 1507 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Juli 1554 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Stewart è nata il il 17 luglio 1489 nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, James IV Stewart King of Scotland, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Marion Margaret Boyd, aveva 12 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton il 10 dicembre 1507, nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 5 luglio 1554, nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Stewartが1489年7月17日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父James IV Stewart King of Scotlandは16歳，母Marion Margaret Boydは12歳であった。1507年12月10日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンでSir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Mortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1554年7月5日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで64歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Stewart(이)가 1489년 7월 17일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James IV Stewart King of Scotland(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marion Margaret Boyd(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1507년 12월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1554년 7월 5일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.17 July 1489–05 July 1554: 17 de julho de 1489–5 de julho de 1554
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Stewart nasceu em 17 de julho de 1489, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, James IV Stewart King of Scotland, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Marion Margaret Boyd, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton em 10 de dezembro de 1507, em Morton, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de julho de 1554, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Stewart родилась 17 июля 1489 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James IV Stewart King of Scotland было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Marion Margaret Boyd, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton 10 декабря 1507 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла 5 июля 1554 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.17 July 1489–05 July 1554: 17 de julio de 1489–5 de julio de 1554
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Stewart nació el 17 de julio de 1489, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, James IV Stewart King of Scotland, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Marion Margaret Boyd, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Sir James Douglas 3rd Earl of Morton el 10 de diciembre de 1507, en Morton, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de julio de 1554, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
